title: Looking for Category Manager at Vision Express India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Vision Express India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vision Express India family as a Category Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vision Express India:
Vision Express India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
